app.name: StudyMate
app.tagline: Your mental game is your competitive advantage

journal.title: Today's Journal
journal.placeholder: Write freely — this is your private space. No one else can read this.
journal.minWords: Write at least 20 words to save your entry

mood.title: How are you right now?
mood.microPrompt: One word for how you're walking into today (optional)

mitra.title: Mitra
mitra.subtitle: Your companion
mitra.placeholder: Tell Mitra what's on your mind...
mitra.aiDisclosure: Mitra is an AI companion — not a therapist. For emergencies, please call iCall: 9152987821
mitra.crisisMessage: I hear you. You're not alone.
mitra.helplinesTitle: If you need to talk to someone right now:

dashboard.title: Your Insights
dashboard.noData: Keep journaling and logging your mood — insights appear after a few days

onboarding.step1Title: Which exam are you preparing for?
onboarding.step3Body: Mitra is your AI companion — available anytime, completely private, here to listen.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: No connection. Your entry will sync when you're back online.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
